CVE-2024-53899.title: virtualenv before 20.26.6 allows command injection through the ac ...
CVE-2024-53899.summary: virtualenv before 20.26.6 allows command injection through the activation scripts for a virtual environment. Magic template strings are not quoted correctly when replacing. NOTE: this is not the same as CVE-2024-9287.
